passiveAbilities.name: Worlds Old & New
passiveAbilities.description: If you faction is Shades, when this model is deployed, place a 50mm Water Feature within 6" and LoS on open ground. If your faction is Dominion, when a friendly Pirate within 6" Jogs it may ignore the effects of Slow (and Slow Carry). Once per turn.

passiveAbilities.name: Cutlass
passiveAbilities.description: If this model deals Slicing Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +1.

activeAbilities.name: Old Pirate Curse
activeAbilities.description: Target without The Black Spot gains [The Black Spot: Enemy Pirates gain +1 Arcane Stat when targeting this character with an action. This character suffers 1 Wd during the Discard Step], until end of game. Then other enemies with The Black Spot lost it.

activeAbilities.name: Reload [Shoot Pistol]
activeAbilities.description: The named ability can be used again. This ability cannot be used while this model is engaged.

arcaneAbilities.name: Shoot Pistol
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target suffers X+1 Impact Dmg.
Catastrophe: This character suffers 3 Wds.

signatureMove.name: 21 Ghoul Salute
signatureMove.endStepEffect: This attack can damage models outside this character's Melee Range and deals +1 Dmg for each other friendly Pirate with the Reload [...] ability within 4".
